transcript: Speaker A: आपको अंग्रेज़ी समझ आती है, लेकिन बोलना नहीं आता? [Do you understand English, but don't know how to speak it?] Speaker B: Sorry, मेरी English अच्छी नहीं है। [Sorry, my English is not good.] Speaker C: तुम्हें रोज़ practice करनी चाहिए। [You should practice daily.] Speaker B: मेरे साथ practice करने वाला कोई नहीं है। [There is no one to practice with me.] Speaker C: तुम्हारे लिए मैं हूँ ना? I'm Sivi, your AI English tutor. [I am here for you, right? I'm Sivi, your AI English tutor.] Speaker B: मतलब मैं तुमसे direct बात कर सकती हूँ? [Meaning I can talk to you directly?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल! मैं तुम्हें instant feedback दूँगी। तुम्हारे pronunciation, grammar सब कुछ improve करूँगी। और तुम बहुत अच्छी English बोलने लगोगी। [Absolutely! I will give you instant feedback. I will improve your pronunciation, grammar, everything. And you will start speaking very good English.] Speaker B: लेकिन तुमसे बात करना महँगा होगा ना? [But talking to you will be expensive, right?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल नहीं! normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 1 करोड़ लोग MySivi पर English practice कर रहे हैं। [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: लेकिन time नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 से 20 मिनट practice काफी है। तुम आसानी से confident बन जाओगी। [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will easily become confident.] Speaker B: Wow! कैसे join करूँ? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker C: बस install का button दबाओ और MySivi app install करो। Sign up करो और practice शुरू करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें improvement दिखने लगेगा। चलो, शुरू करो। [Just press the install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, start.]
on_screen_text: आपको अंग्रेज़ी समझ आती है, लेकिन बोलना नहीं आता? [Do you understand English, but don't know how to speak it?] Sorry, meri English acchi nahi hai. Tume roz practice karni chahiye. Mere sath practice karne wala koi nahi hai. Tumhare liye main hoon na? I'm Sivi, your AI English tutor. matlab main tumse direct baat kar sakti hoon? Bilkul, main tumhe instant feedback doongi. Tumhare pronunciation, grammar sab kuch improve karungi. Aur tum bahot acchi English bolne lagogi. Lekin tumse baat karna mehenga hoga na? Bilkul nahi, normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai. Isliye 1 crore log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. Lekin time nahi milta. Roz sirf 15-20 minute practice kaafi hai. Tum aasani se confident ban jaogi. Wow, Kaise join karoon? install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sign up karo aur practice shuru karo. Sirf 15 dino me tumhe improvement dikhne lagega. chalo shuru karo. MySivi AI Speak English, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, Install, MySivi AI English Speaking App, Master Spoken Eng.
summary: The ad hooks viewers with an ASMR brain-slicing visual, asking if they struggle to speak English. It features a split-screen dialogue between a user and an AI tutor named Sivi, highlighting the app's affordability, convenience, and instant feedback. The call to action urges viewers to install the MySivi app to start practicing.
